label: DDD bounded contexts — enthusiast
summary: One folder per bounded context with domain / application / infrastructure / presentation. Shared kernel only for truly shared types; contexts do not import each other.

layerDescriptions.DomainModel: Per-context pure business rules and entities. No I/O.
layerDescriptions.ApplicationOrchestration: Per-context use cases that call domain through ports.
layerDescriptions.PresentationAdapters: Controllers, HTTP, or UI entrypoints for a context.
layerDescriptions.PersistenceAdapters: Repository and external I/O implementations for a context.
layerDescriptions.SharedKernel: Cross-context primitives only — keep this thin.
